prompt: Implement the plan at .prism/shared/plans/2026-03-01-three-package-split.md starting from Phase 1. The plan has 20 phases total.
expected_output: Phase 1 is implemented with verification run, checkpoint marked complete, and a stop-and-confirm message asking for approval before Phase 2.
expectations: Loads the plan file and identifies current phase status before making changes
Reads ALL files listed in Phase 1 before modifying anything
Marks each step checkbox as completed: - [x]
Runs verification commands specified in the plan
Marks the phase checkpoint as complete
Presents a Phase 1 Complete summary with changes, verification status, and next phase
Stops and waits for user approval before proceeding to Phase 2
